description: Style Note Casual dressing only gets better with these slip-on sandals from red tape. This pair is a great combination of style and functionality - they're a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Product Details Leather straps covering the forefoot and midfoot for durability and style A leather loop on the upper middle holding the straps in place Padded ankle strap in leather to lock the foot in place with a velcro closure All straps have a fabric inner lining and are padded to protect the feet from blistering and to offer breathable comfort Padded nubuck footbed Upper stitched to the outsole for durability Durable rubber outsole, curved at the midfoot to offer absolute ergonomic comfort Textured outsole with multi-directional lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
